B2B Campaign - Source Document

Complete source document for the HeyZack B2B property management campaign deck

HeyZack B2B Campaign Deck Source Document

Deck Metadata

  • Purpose: Sales Enablement for Property Managers
  • Audience: Commercial Property Managers, Facilities Directors, Building Owners
  • Target Slides: 15
  • Tone: Professional, helpful, ROI-focused
  • Generated: 2026-01-25

Brand Styling

Colors

RoleHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Headlines, trust elements, data
Primary Pink#E82F89CTAs, savings highlights, action
Black#2E2D2CBody text
Grey#E9EDEFCard backgrounds, dividers
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Hero moments, key CTAs

Typography

  • Headlines: Modern sans-serif — Bold, 48-64px
  • Body: Clean sans-serif — Regular, 18-24px
  • Data: Extra bold numbers — 72-120px for ROI/savings

Visual Direction

  • Photography: Modern buildings, property managers at work, clean tech
  • Scenarios: Show real property management situations
  • Before/After: Emphasize transformation
  • Charts: ROI calculators, energy savings graphs

Content by Slide

Slide 1: Title

Headline: HeyZack for Property Management Subhead: AI-Powered Building Automation That Actually Delivers ROI Visual: Modern apartment building at dusk, lights in windows, HeyZack gradient overlay Speaker Notes: Position as a peer-to-peer conversation, not a vendor pitch.

Slide 2: We Get It

Headline: We Know Your Pain Points Body: Managing multiple properties means juggling vendors, chasing complaints, and watching energy costs eat into margins. Traditional building automation? Too expensive. Consumer smart devices? They don’t scale.

Pain Points (with icons):

  • 🔧 Vendor Dependency — $200 service calls for thermostat changes
  • 📱 App Chaos — 7+ different apps across your portfolio
  • 💸 Energy Waste — No visibility into where money goes
  • 😤 Tenant Complaints — “It’s too hot/cold” calls at 10 PM
  • 📈 Budget Pressure — Ownership wants OpEx down, not up

Visual: Property manager at desk surrounded by multiple screens/phones Speaker Notes: Build empathy. Show you understand their world.

Slide 3: Meet Patricia

Headline: Sound Familiar? Persona Story:

Patricia manages 30 apartment buildings across three cities. Last month:

  • 47 “temperature complaint” calls
  • $4,200 in emergency HVAC service visits
  • Zero visibility into which buildings are wasting energy
  • Ownership asking why OpEx is 15% over budget

Quote: “I spend more time putting out fires than actually improving operations.”

Visual: Professional woman (property manager persona) looking at phone, concerned Speaker Notes: Personalize the problem. Patricia is their peer.

Slide 4: There’s a Better Way

Headline: What If You Could… Possibilities (each with checkmark):

  • ✓ Adjust any thermostat in any building from your phone
  • ✓ See exactly where every energy dollar goes
  • ✓ Get alerted to HVAC problems before tenants complain
  • ✓ Automate guest/tenant check-ins without staff intervention
  • ✓ Prove ROI to ownership with actual data, not estimates

Teaser: All of this is possible—without a $85K investment or 6-month implementation.

Visual: Dashboard preview showing multi-property control Speaker Notes: Shift from pain to possibility. Build anticipation.

Slide 5: Introducing HeyZack

Headline: Portfolio-Scale Automation at 95% Lower Cost Body: HeyZack is the first building automation platform designed specifically for property managers who need to scale efficiently—without vendor dependency, massive budgets, or technical expertise.

Key Stats:

  • $5K per building (vs. $85K traditional BMS)
  • One dashboard for unlimited properties
  • 20-30% energy savings with AI optimization
  • DIY installation — your maintenance team can do it

Visual: Product ecosystem with app interface prominent Speaker Notes: The reveal. Solution to everything we just discussed.

Slide 6: One Dashboard, Unlimited Properties

Headline: See Everything. Control Everything. Features:

  • Portfolio Overview — All buildings, one screen
  • Remote Control — Adjust any device from anywhere
  • Alert Management — Proactive notifications, not reactive panic
  • Energy Analytics — Real-time consumption by building/unit/device
  • Tenant Automation — Check-in/out triggers climate & access

Visual: Dashboard screenshot showing multi-property view Speaker Notes: Demo the dashboard if possible. This is the “aha” moment.

Slide 7: Real AI, Real Savings

Headline: Not Schedules—Intelligence Body: Most “smart” systems are just timers. HeyZack’s AI actually learns:

What It Learns:

  • Occupancy patterns (not just schedules—actual behavior)
  • Seasonal adjustments (adapts as weather changes)
  • Anomaly detection (catches problems before failures)
  • Optimization opportunities (finds savings you’d never see)

Savings Curve:

MonthSavings
Month 1-210-15% (baseline optimization)
Month 3-415-20% (pattern learning)
Month 5+20-30% (full AI optimization)

Visual: Line graph showing savings increasing over time Speaker Notes: The AI gets smarter. Savings compound.

Slide 8: Use Case — Remote Climate Control

Headline: Scenario: The 10 PM Complaint Call Story:

Before HeyZack: Tenant in Building F calls at 10 PM: “It’s too hot.” You call the emergency HVAC line. $350 service call. Technician adjusts thermostat from 78°F to 74°F. Problem solved… for $350.

With HeyZack: Same call, same tenant. You open the app, see the thermostat setting, remotely adjust to 74°F. Confirm with tenant. Resolution time: 90 seconds. Cost: $0.

Savings: $350 × 12 calls/year = $4,200/year saved (just on this one scenario)

Visual: Before/after split screen showing old way vs. HeyZack way Speaker Notes: Concrete ROI. This scenario alone often pays for the system.

Slide 9: Use Case — Proactive Maintenance

Headline: Catch Problems Before They’re Emergencies Story:

HeyZack detects HVAC in Building M is cycling 40% more frequently than baseline.

Alert: “Potential compressor issue detected. Schedule preventive maintenance.”

Your action: Schedule $800 maintenance visit.

If you hadn’t caught it: $12,000 emergency compressor replacement + angry tenants + 3-star Google reviews.

ROI: $800 preventive vs. $12,000 emergency = $11,200 saved

Visual: Alert notification mockup with building diagram Speaker Notes: Peace of mind has ROI. Proactive beats reactive.

Slide 10: Use Case — Automated Guest Experience (Hospitality)

Headline: Zero-Touch Turnover for Vacation Rentals Story:

Guest books for 3 PM check-in.

At 2:30 PM, HeyZack automatically:

  • Sends door access code to guest
  • Pre-cools room to 72°F
  • Turns on welcome lighting
  • Disarms security mode

Guest arrives: Code works. Room is perfect. Zero staff intervention.

At checkout: Guest leaves. HeyZack detects departure. HVAC switches to eco mode. Security arms. Lights off.

Savings: 5+ hours of unnecessary HVAC × $3.50/day × 365 days = $6,400/year per property

Visual: Timeline showing automated sequence Speaker Notes: For hospitality clients. Scales beautifully.

Slide 11: Complete Product Ecosystem

Headline: 128 Products. One Vendor. Zero Fragmentation. Categories:

CategoryProductsUse Case
Climate Control14Thermostats, HVAC valves, radiators
Cameras & Doorbells9Security, package monitoring
Smart Locks13Access control, keyless entry
Sensors13Motion, door/window, leak detection
Energy Management12Breakers, switches, monitoring
Lighting18Dimmers, LED drivers, occupancy
Gateways4Zigbee, WiFi, Matter connectivity

Total: 128 products across 15 categories

Visual: Product category grid with representative images Speaker Notes: One vendor for everything = simplified procurement and support.

Slide 12: ROI Calculator

Headline: See Your Savings Calculator (fill in the blanks):

InputYour Numbers
Number of buildings___
Average monthly energy cost per building$____
Emergency service calls per year___
Average cost per service call$____
OutputProjected Savings
Energy savings (25%)$____ /year
Service call reduction (60%)$____ /year
Total Annual Savings$____
Payback Period___ months

Example: 20 buildings × $2,000/mo energy × 25% = $120,000/year savings

Visual: Interactive calculator mockup or filled example Speaker Notes: Make it real for their specific situation.

Slide 13: Implementation Timeline

Headline: From Purchase to ROI in 30 Days Timeline:

WeekMilestone
Week 1Assessment call, system design, order placed
Week 2Equipment arrives, installation begins (DIY or installer)
Week 3Configuration, testing, team training
Week 4Go-live, AI learning begins
Month 2-3AI optimization improves, savings increase
Month 4+Full ROI achieved, expansion opportunities

Comparison:

  • Traditional BMS: 6-12 months to deploy
  • HeyZack: 30 days to first savings

Visual: Horizontal timeline with milestone markers Speaker Notes: Speed to value is a major differentiator.

Slide 14: Why HeyZack

Headline: The Bottom Line Summary Grid:

What You GetWhat You Avoid
One dashboard for all propertiesJuggling 7+ apps
20-30% energy savingsRising utility costs
Proactive maintenance alerts$12K emergency repairs
DIY installation$85K vendor installations
No service contractsVendor dependency
Transparent pricingHidden fees and surprises

Guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee. If it doesn’t deliver, return it.

Visual: Two-column comparison with checkmarks and X marks Speaker Notes: Summarize the value. Make the decision easy.

Slide 15: Let’s Talk

Headline: Ready to Transform Your Portfolio? CTAs:

  • Free Assessment Call — 30-minute portfolio analysis, no obligation
  • Pilot Program — Start with 3 buildings, prove ROI, then expand
  • Live Demo — See the platform in action

Contact:

  • 📧 property@heyzack.ai
  • 📞 1-800-HEYZACK
  • 🌐 heyzack.ai/property-management
  • 📅 calendly.com/heyzack-pm

Visual: Gradient background, contact info prominent, logo Speaker Notes: Clear next steps. Make it easy to take action.
